title: ✨ Senior Systems Engineer - 5G & Edge Innovation
description:
About the Role

Ready to shape the future of connectivity in Singapore? Join our dynamic, forward-thinking team at the heart of telecom innovation. As a Senior Systems Engineer, you will lead end-to-end project delivery for resilient 5G/edge solutions serving tier-1 clients and key public sector partners. This role is about more than maintenance; it's about driving DevSecOps excellence, integrating emerging AI capabilities, and ensuring zero-downtime operations for mission-critical systems. You'll also have the opportunity to mentor junior engineers and champion sustainable technology practices in a collaborative, hybrid-work environment. We offer a competitive salary and invest in your future with SkillsFuture sponsorship.

🚀 What You'll Be Doing (Core Impact & Responsibilities)

Your expertise will be the cornerstone of our operations, spanning system architecture, security, automation, and operational excellence:

  • Spearhead the design, implementation, and commissioning of turnkey telecom/IT solutions using cutting-edge platforms (e.g., VMware, Red Hat, AWS EKS). This includes hands-on hardware integration (Cisco/Fortigate) and generating high-quality documentation (HLD/LLD, MoPs, UAT/SAT).
  • Build and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins/GitHub Actions) leveraging Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform). Enforce DevSecOps best practices across Kubernetes and orchestration platforms, automating workflows to ensure scalability for edge and IoT systems.
  • Be part of our rotational 24/7 support structure, providing expert-level troubleshooting for complex network and firewall issues. Protect our systems by conducting VAPT (Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing), remediating per OWASP/IMDA standards, and integrating AI for proactive, predictive threat detection.
  • Optimise Application Performance: Tune and manage critical application servers (Tomcat/WebLogic), including JVM optimisation and RESTful API integrations. You'll also be optimising SIP/RTP signaling on Session Border Controllers (SBCs like Acme Packet).
  • Facilitate essential technical workshops, manage vendor escalations, and lead compliance reviews. Act as a mentor, guiding junior engineers in technical best practices and career growth.

🌟 What We're Looking For (Skills & Experience)

  • Bachelor's/Diploma in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field (Telecom/Communications/Cybersecurity/AI specialisation preferred), with 5+ years in telecom systems engineering and proven project leadership experience.
  • Proficiency in Linux/VMware/AWS, strong scripting skills (Bash/Python/PowerShell), and hands-on experience with security tools (WAF/IDS/IPS) and containerization (Docker/K8s).
  • Familiarity with 5G core elements, SIP protocols, app servers, and network security concepts (IAM/SSL/encryption).
  • Experience with AI/ML for network analytics, cloud-edge computing, and an awareness of sustainability metrics (e.g., carbon footprint tools).
  • Holds a relevant certification like CCNA/CCNP, AWS Certified DevOps, CISSP, or equivalent.
  • A strong analytical and problem-solving mindset, excellent communication skills for both technical and non-technical audiences, and a collaborative, adaptable approach.

🎁 The Perks (What We Offer)

  • Work on national-scale projects with global industry vendors, truly making a difference to Singapore's infrastructure.
  • Structured professional development, including training in AI and quantum technologies, and formal mentorship opportunities.
  • Enjoy 18 days of Annual Leave, comprehensive medical coverage, and flexible working hours to support work-life balance.
  • Join an inclusive team, participate in DEI initiatives, and engage in community volunteering.
